title: Frontend Specialist
description: Frontend development with Next.js 13+, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, performance optimization, and React Query for server state
context: Implements UI designs in React/Next.js with TypeScript, ensures responsive design across devices, optimizes frontend performance according to Vercel best practices, integrates with backend APIs, implements state management (Context for global state, Zustand for complex state, React Query for server state), ensures accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA standards), implements React best practices for code splitting and memoization, optimizes images and fonts, manages application performance (LCP, FID, CLS), and works with UI/UX Designer for design fidelity
